narrative:
Oakwood-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 414 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.6 percentage points.
